hero.description: Avantiqo connects business operations directly to accounting, finance, documents, payroll, approvals, and execution through one Synthetic Intelligence layer. Every operational event becomes financial intelligence in real time.
hero.trust: Built for accounting firms, business owners, multi-entity groups, and companies ready to move beyond disconnected software.

accounting.badge: THE END OF THE GAP BETWEEN BUSINESS AND ACCOUNTING
accounting.description: For decades, businesses operated in one world while accountants worked in another. Avantiqo eliminates that gap by turning operations, invoices, payroll, procurement, documents, and approvals into live financial intelligence.

operations.title: Business Reality
operations.description: Revenue, costs, staff, inventory, projects, documents, and approvals are captured while the business is operating.

accounting.title: Financial Intelligence
accounting.description: Operational activity becomes accounting-ready intelligence instead of delayed paperwork, spreadsheets, and manual reconciliation.

firms.title: Accounting Firms
firms.description: Firms can monitor clients continuously, detect risks earlier, and move from bookkeeping into high-value advisory.

execution.title: Enterprise Execution
execution.description: The system does not stop at reports. It coordinates approvals, governance, workflows, and operational accountability.

synthetic.description: AI can generate text, images, and reports. Synthetic Intelligence understands how the business actually works. It connects people, money, documents, customers, suppliers, workflows, decisions, and accounting into one living operating layer.
synthetic.formula: Business Operations + Accounting Intelligence + Enterprise Memory + Execution = Synthetic Intelligence.

cta.description: Accounting firms that connect directly to their clients' operations will not just report the past. They will understand the present, forecast risk, guide decisions, and help businesses operate better.

workspace.description: Operations, Finance, Accounting, Documents, Approvals, Marketing, AI Runtime and Enterprise Control connected through one operating layer.

clientManagement.title: CLIENT MANAGEMENT
clientManagement.description: Manage all clients from one workspace.

industries.description: Every industry operates differently. Restaurants, hotels, accounting firms, retailers, construction companies and enterprise groups all require different workflows, controls and intelligence. Avantiqo adapts to your business while keeping Customers, Marketing, Operations, Finance and Intelligence connected on one platform.

professionalServices.title: Professional Services
professionalServices.description: Accounting firms, legal firms, consultants, agencies and service businesses.

hospitality.title: Hospitality
hospitality.description: Restaurants, hotels, resorts, beach clubs and nightlife venues.

retail.title: Retail & Commerce
retail.description: Retail stores, shopping malls, franchises and e-commerce.

construction.title: Construction & Property
construction.description: Construction, real estate, property management and development.

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Multi-company groups, holdings, family offices and enterprise organizations.

intelligence.description: Avantiqo adapts to your industry while keeping Revenue, Operations, Finance and Intelligence connected through one operating platform.

cta.description: Whether you run a restaurant, accounting firm, hotel, construction company, retail chain or enterprise group, Avantiqo adapts the operating system to your industry while keeping Revenue, Operations, Finance and Intelligence connected.

businessFunctions.description: From customer acquisition to financial reporting, every function operates on the same foundation.

intelligenceLayer.description: Avantiqo observes activity across every department, understands relationships between data, recommends actions, and gradually automates execution.

steps.title: OBSERVE
steps.desc: Collects activity across customers, operations, finance and workforce.

steps.title: UNDERSTAND
steps.desc: Builds relationships between people, data, processes and outcomes.

dataFoundation.description: No disconnected systems. No duplicated records. No manual reconciliation. Every module, department and industry runtime operates from the same foundation.

hero.description: Reservas, operaciones, personal, finanzas, marketing y experiencia del huésped conectados mediante una sola capa de inteligencia sintética.

reality.title1: La hospitalidad está conectada en todas partes.

relationships.badge: DE LA ACTIVIDAD A LA INTELIGENCIA
relationships.title1: La mayoría de los sistemas almacenan eventos.

cta.title1: La hospitalidad fue construida alrededor de las operaciones.
cta.title2: El futuro se construirá alrededor de la inteligencia.
cta.description: Avantiqo conecta operaciones, finanzas, personal, marketing y experiencia del huésped mediante un Sistema Operativo de Inteligencia Sintética.

realityContent: La mayoría de los negocios de hospitalidad operan mediante sistemas desconectados. Las reservas viven en una plataforma, las operaciones en otra y las finanzas ven el negocio semanas después. Marketing trabaja con supuestos y la dirección reacciona en lugar de liderar.
El problema no es la falta de datos. El problema es la falta de comprensión.
Los negocios de hospitalidad no necesitan más software. Necesitan un único sistema operativo.
hospitality.runtimeContent: No departamentos separados. No software separado. Una única base conectada donde cada acción forma parte de la misma historia empresarial.
relationshipsItems: Una reserva no es solo una reserva. Es demanda.
Un turno no es solo un turno. Es costo laboral.
Un pedido no es solo un pedido. Es ingresos.
Una reseña no es solo una reseña. Es crecimiento futuro.
hospitality.relationshipsDescription: Esa es la diferencia entre software e Inteligencia Sintética. Avantiqo conecta directamente la actividad operativa con el significado empresarial.
hospitality.intelligenceDescription: La hospitalidad no es una colección de eventos separados. Cada acción crea consecuencias en todo el negocio. Avantiqo sigue automáticamente esas consecuencias.

intelligenceChain.eventTitle: La demanda de reservas aumenta para el próximo fin de semana

cards.label: Personal
cards.title: Los requerimientos de personal se ajustan automáticamente

cards.label: Inventario
cards.title: Se actualizan las previsiones de compras

cards.label: Finanzas
cards.title: Se recalculan las proyecciones de ingresos y costos laborales

intelligenceChain.ownershipTitle: Los propietarios ven el impacto antes de que ocurra.

syntheticContent: La mayoría de las plataformas terminan en los informes. Avantiqo continúa hacia la acción.

El sistema observa continuamente la actividad de huéspedes, personal, operaciones, finanzas y propietarios. Identifica patrones, predice resultados, recomienda acciones y ejecuta automáticamente flujos de trabajo aprobados.
Esto no es un chatbot. Es una capa de inteligencia operativa integrada directamente en el negocio.

challenges.title: La experiencia del huésped está fragmentada
challenges.text: El historial del huésped, preferencias, reseñas, programas de fidelización, actividad de mesas y datos de marketing suelen estar repartidos en diferentes sistemas. Avantiqo reúne toda la visión del huésped en una sola capa operativa.

challenges.title: El rendimiento del personal es invisible
challenges.text: Los gerentes suelen saber quién trabaja, pero no quién rinde, quién llega tarde, quién genera valor o dónde disminuye la calidad del servicio. Avantiqo conecta la actividad del personal con la responsabilidad.

challenges.title: El POS está desconectado del control
challenges.text: Los sistemas POS tradicionales registran ventas. Avantiqo conecta las ventas con cocina, inventario, perfiles de clientes, desempeño del personal y decisiones de gestión.

challenges.title: La cocina y la producción pierden margen
challenges.text: Sin producción conectada, costeo de recetas, seguimiento de desperdicios y visibilidad de inventario, los negocios pierden dinero silenciosamente cada día.

challenges.title: El marketing llega demasiado tarde
challenges.text: Muchos establecimientos publican contenido al azar. Avantiqo puede convertir días lentos, comportamiento de huéspedes, eventos y objetivos empresariales en campañas automáticas.

challenges.title: Los propietarios carecen de una única fuente de verdad
challenges.text: Restaurantes, hoteles, beach clubs, spas y grupos con múltiples ubicaciones necesitan un sistema que muestre qué sucede ahora y qué debería suceder después.

whyCards.title: Portal del Cliente
whyCards.text: Permita que los huéspedes accedan a fidelización, recompensas, reservas, preferencias, historial y ofertas personalizadas. Cada interacción se convierte en parte de la inteligencia del cliente.

whyCards.title: Portal del Empleado
whyCards.text: El personal puede gestionar asistencia, tareas, confirmaciones, visibilidad salarial y rendimiento. Los gerentes pueden aprobar excepciones antes de que afecten la nómina.

whyCards.title: Control POS
whyCards.text: Las ventas no están aisladas. Cada pedido puede conectarse con datos de clientes, cocina, rendimiento del personal, inventario y paneles de gestión.

whyCards.title: Flujo de Cocina
whyCards.text: Los pedidos pasan del POS a la cocina con estados claros, seguimiento de preparación, finalización y visibilidad operativa.

whyCards.title: Inventario y Producción
whyCards.text: Conecte recetas, inventario, control de costos, consumo de producción y desperdicios para visualizar los márgenes antes del cierre mensual.

whyCards.title: Motor de Marketing IA
whyCards.text: Genere automáticamente anuncios, campañas, promociones de eventos y contenido para redes sociales utilizando datos reales del negocio.

operatingSystem.title: Inteligencia del Cliente
operatingSystem.text: Perfiles, fidelización, historial de visitas, productos favoritos, reseñas, estado VIP, consentimiento de marketing y valor del cliente en una sola vista.

operatingSystem.title: Reservas y Mesas
operatingSystem.text: Reservas, mesas, flujo de huéspedes, tiempos de servicio y planificación operativa conectados con todo el negocio.

operatingSystem.title: POS y Pedidos
operatingSystem.text: Flujo de ventas rápido conectado con cocina, historial del cliente, responsabilidad del personal e informes financieros.

operatingSystem.title: Cocina y Producción
operatingSystem.text: Estado de pedidos en tiempo real, control de producción, costeo de recetas, impacto en inventario y visibilidad de desperdicios.

operatingSystem.title: Personal y Nómina
operatingSystem.text: Asistencia, retrasos, aprobaciones, finalización de tareas, confirmación salarial y control basado en rendimiento.

operatingSystem.title: Inventario y Costos
operatingSystem.text: Consumo de inventario, compras, transferencias, costos de productos, costo de alimentos, desperdicios y rentabilidad conectados a las operaciones.

operatingSystem.title: Reseñas y Reputación
operatingSystem.text: Reseñas de Google, comentarios de huéspedes, problemas de servicio y oportunidades de respuesta conectados con la inteligencia de clientes y empleados.

operatingSystem.title: Marketing y Estudio Creativo
operatingSystem.text: Cree campañas, carteles, anuncios, contenido para redes sociales y material de marca directamente desde el sistema.

operatingSystem.title: Inteligencia Sintética
operatingSystem.text: Prediga días tranquilos, presión de personal, problemas de inventario, pérdida de clientes, oportunidades de marketing y riesgos operativos.

syntheticActions.title: Predecir días tranquilos
syntheticActions.text: Cuando las tendencias de ingresos indiquen una desaceleración, Avantiqo puede recomendar promociones, eventos y ajustes de personal.

syntheticActions.title: Recomendar promociones
syntheticActions.text: El sistema sugiere qué promocionar según el comportamiento de los huéspedes, niveles de inventario, márgenes, clima y estacionalidad.

syntheticActions.title: Generar anuncios y publicaciones
syntheticActions.text: Convierta objetivos empresariales en campañas, textos promocionales, creatividades y contenido listo para publicar.

syntheticActions.title: Detectar riesgos de servicio
syntheticActions.text: Si las reseñas, retrasos, comportamiento del personal o excepciones operativas indican problemas, la dirección puede actuar antes de que afecten la reputación.

syntheticActions.title: Optimizar la plantilla
syntheticActions.text: Utilice ingresos, reservas, volumen de pedidos y flujo de huéspedes para anticipar necesidades de personal.

syntheticActions.title: Proteger los márgenes
syntheticActions.text: Conecte POS, cocina, recetas, inventario y desperdicios para que los propietarios vean inmediatamente dónde se pierde rentabilidad.

hero.description: Avantiqo ofrece a las firmas contables visibilidad en tiempo real sobre operaciones, aprobaciones, nómina, compras y actividad financiera, en lugar de esperar documentación 30 días después.
hero.primary: Construya la firma contable de próxima generación

advisory.description: Avantiqo ayuda a las firmas contables a convertirse en socios de inteligencia operativa en tiempo real, no solo proveedores de contabilidad de fin de mes.

enterprise.description: Avantiqo proporciona a las firmas contables visibilidad operativa de nivel empresarial, control de permisos y trazabilidad completa en todos sus clientes.

cta.description: Avantiqo transforma las firmas contables en socios de inteligencia operativa en tiempo real.

enterpriseCards.title: Permisos Basados en Roles
enterpriseCards.description: Cada contador solo ve las empresas, aprobaciones y áreas operativas asignadas.

enterpriseCards.title: Historial Completo de Auditoría
enterpriseCards.description: Cada aprobación, documento y acción operativa queda registrada automáticamente.

enterpriseCards.title: Responsabilidad de Aprobaciones
enterpriseCards.description: Sepa exactamente quién aprobó qué, cuándo y desde qué flujo operativo.

enterpriseCards.title: Runtime Multiempresa
enterpriseCards.description: Gestione múltiples empresas, sucursales y entidades operativas desde un sistema conectado.

enterpriseCards.title: Historial Operativo Buscable
enterpriseCards.description: Encuentre instantáneamente facturas, aprobaciones, actividad de nómina y cambios operativos.

enterpriseCards.title: Monitoreo Operativo en Vivo
enterpriseCards.description: Identifique problemas financieros y operativos antes de que se conviertan en sorpresas de fin de mes.

advisorCards.description: Pase de una contabilidad reactiva a una guía operativa proactiva con visibilidad en tiempo real.

advisorCards.title: Aumentar la Confianza del Propietario
advisorCards.description: Ofrezca acceso transparente a aprobaciones, documentos, gastos y actividad financiera.

advisorCards.label: Riesgo
advisorCards.title: Reducir Pérdidas y Errores
advisorCards.description: Detecte actividad inusual, facturas faltantes y retrasos antes de que se conviertan en problemas de fin de mes.

roiCards.label: Crecimiento
roiCards.title: Gestionar Más Clientes
roiCards.description: Reduzca el trabajo contable manual conectando facturas, nómina, compras y aprobaciones.

roiCards.label: Visibilidad
roiCards.title: Descubrir Problemas Antes
roiCards.description: Monitoree operaciones en tiempo real en lugar de esperar informes de fin de mes.

features.description: Monitoree ingresos, nómina, compras, aprobaciones y costos operativos en tiempo real.

features.title: EXTRACCIÓN DE DOCUMENTOS CON IA
features.description: Facturas, recibos y documentos extraídos y organizados automáticamente.

syntheticDecisionLayer.title: Inteligencia Operativa Predictiva
syntheticDecisionLayer.recommendationText: Retrasar el cierre financiero hasta completar la conciliación de compras.

syntheticDecisionLayer.detectionText: Comportamiento inusual de aprobación detectado en operaciones hospitality.

traditional: Sin monitoreo en vivo de clientes

syntheticSection.headline2: La inteligencia sintética entiende los negocios.
syntheticSection.aiText: Genera contenido. Responde preguntas. Crea informes. Responde a instrucciones.
syntheticSection.syntheticText: Comprende relaciones entre nómina, compras, aprobaciones, documentos, contabilidad, inventario y operaciones. Detecta riesgos. Predice resultados. Recomienda acciones. Genera inteligencia operativa.
syntheticSection.receiptText: Afecta aprobaciones, contabilidad, conciliación de compras, cierre financiero, confianza de auditoría y visibilidad directiva.
syntheticSection.receiptFooter: La inteligencia sintética comprende toda la reacción en cadena.

riskRuntimeLists.aiPayroll: Inconsistencia de nómina identificada antes del cierre financiero.

enterpriseRuntime.auditChain: Integridad de la Cadena de Auditoría
enterpriseRuntime.auditDescription: Cada aprobación, edición, transacción y evento operativo queda rastreado permanentemente.
enterpriseRuntime.financialDesc: Conectado a flujos de ingresos en vivo

challenges.title: Datos de clientes desconectados
challenges.text: Los documentos de clientes, sistemas contables, aprobaciones, nómina, facturas e informes viven en lugares diferentes. Los socios pierden visibilidad y los equipos pierden tiempo buscando, verificando y corrigiendo.

challenges.title: Los clientes de bajo margen son difíciles de identificar
challenges.text: Muchas firmas conocen los ingresos por cliente, pero no la rentabilidad real. Avantiqo ayuda a revelar qué clientes consumen tiempo, generan excepciones y reducen el margen.

challenges.title: Presión de cumplimiento manual
challenges.text: Los plazos, aprobaciones, rastros documentales, flujos fiscales y preparación de auditorías generan riesgos cuando dependen del seguimiento manual.

challenges.title: La asesoría es difícil de escalar
challenges.text: Muchas firmas quieren ir más allá de la contabilidad, pero el conocimiento de asesoría suele estar atrapado en personal senior. Avantiqo convierte los datos financieros en inteligencia repetible.

whyCards.title: Inteligencia de Rentabilidad del Cliente
whyCards.text: Vea qué clientes son rentables, cuáles necesitan intervención y cuáles consumen demasiada capacidad antes de que los márgenes disminuyan.

whyCards.title: Rendimiento de la Firma
whyCards.text: Supervise utilización, recuperación, carga de trabajo, WIP, aprobaciones y desempeño del equipo en toda la firma.

whyCards.title: Cumplimiento y Preparación para Auditorías
whyCards.text: Mantenga gobernanza, trazabilidad de aprobaciones, control documental y visibilidad de auditoría desde una sola capa operativa.

whyCards.title: Inteligencia de Asesoría
whyCards.text: Identifique riesgos, problemas de flujo de caja, tendencias inusuales, oportunidades de asesoría y próximas acciones recomendadas.

operatingSystem.title: Inteligencia del Cliente
operatingSystem.text: Perfiles de clientes, estado documental, actividad contable, plazos, comunicación, rentabilidad y riesgo en un solo lugar.

operatingSystem.title: Control de Flujos de Trabajo
operatingSystem.text: Controle contabilidad, nómina, conciliaciones, impuestos, aprobaciones, revisiones y cierres mensuales.

operatingSystem.title: Runtime Financiero
operatingSystem.text: Conecta eventos contables, aprobaciones operativas, conciliaciones, excepciones e informes financieros.

operatingSystem.title: Panel de Socios
operatingSystem.text: Ofrece visibilidad en tiempo real sobre clientes, capacidad del equipo, plazos, ingresos, rentabilidad y riesgos.

operatingSystem.title: Inteligencia Sintética
operatingSystem.text: Predice riesgos, detecta anomalías, recomienda acciones y reduce el trabajo manual de revisión.

operatingSystem.title: Entregables para Clientes
operatingSystem.text: Cree informes, resúmenes de asesoría, revisiones financieras y presentaciones de gestión más rápido.

intelligence.title: Predecir riesgo del cliente
intelligence.text: Identifique clientes propensos a incumplir plazos, presentar documentación incompleta o generar riesgos de cumplimiento.

intelligence.title: Detectar anomalías
intelligence.text: Encuentre transacciones inusuales, variaciones de nómina, excepciones de conciliación y caídas de margen.

intelligence.title: Recomendar acciones de asesoría
intelligence.text: Convierta los datos contables en recomendaciones que los clientes comprendan y valoren.

intelligence.title: Priorizar la atención de los socios
intelligence.text: Muestre qué clientes, tareas, excepciones y oportunidades requieren atención hoy.

roi.label: Mayor margen
roi.title: Reducir trabajo no facturado
roi.text: Cuando el trabajo, las excepciones y las aprobaciones son visibles, las firmas pueden proteger márgenes y reducir pérdidas de tiempo ocultas.

roi.label: Más ingresos por asesoría
roi.title: Convertir datos en asesoría
roi.text: Avantiqo ayuda a convertir datos financieros en información de alto valor para clientes.

roi.label: Mejor control
roi.title: Conocer el estado de cada cliente
roi.text: Los socios pueden ver salud del cliente, cumplimiento, plazos, carga de trabajo y exposición financiera desde un solo sistema.

roi.label: Firma escalable
roi.title: Crecer sin caos
roi.text: Los flujos estandarizados, la inteligencia sintética y la gobernanza facilitan el crecimiento sin perder control.

hero.title2: Antes de que le diga que algo va mal.
hero.description: Pacientes, clínicos, operaciones, finanzas, cumplimiento y liderazgo conectados mediante una capa de inteligencia sintética.

reality.title1: La salud está conectada en todas partes.

runtime.title1: Demanda de pacientes. Carga clínica. Capacidad de camas.
runtime.title2: Disponibilidad de personal. Exposición financiera. Riesgo de cumplimiento.

cta.title1: La salud se construyó alrededor del tratamiento.
cta.title2: El futuro se construirá alrededor de la inteligencia.
cta.description: Avantiqo conecta pacientes, clínicos, operaciones, finanzas, cumplimiento y dirección a través de un sistema operativo de inteligencia sintética.

healthcare.operational_bottlenecks_create_delays_lo: Los cuellos de botella operativos crean retrasos mucho antes de que la gerencia se dé cuenta
healthcare.overstaffing_and_understaffing_often_hap: El exceso y la escasez de personal a menudo ocurren al mismo tiempo en diferentes departamentos
healthcare.disconnected_systems_create_missed_billi: Los sistemas desconectados crean oportunidades de facturación perdidas y costos operativos ocultos
healthcare.beds_rooms_equipment_and_staff_capacity_: Camas, habitaciones, equipos y personal rara vez se ven como una realidad conectada
healthcare.risk_grows_when_operational_events_and_c: El riesgo aumenta cuando los eventos operativos y las obligaciones de cumplimiento están desconectados
healthcare.leadership_receives_reports_after_events: La dirección recibe informes después de los eventos en lugar de comprender los riesgos de antemano
healthcare.live_operational_visibility_across_patie: Visibilidad operativa en vivo de pacientes, clínicos, capacidad, finanzas y cumplimiento
healthcare.predictive_intelligence_identifies_press: La inteligencia predictiva identifica presión, riesgo y cuellos de botella antes de la escalada
healthcare.recommended_actions_help_leadership_inte: Las acciones recomendadas ayudan a la dirección a intervenir antes de que ocurra un fallo operativo
healthcare.reality_content_1: Una admisión de paciente afecta la disponibilidad del personal. La planificación afecta la programación. La programación afecta la capacidad. La capacidad afecta los tiempos de tratamiento.
healthcare.reality_content_2: El tratamiento afecta los resultados. Los resultados afectan el reembolso. El reembolso afecta el desempeño financiero.
healthcare.reality_content_3: La mayoría de las organizaciones de salud registran estos eventos por separado. Avantiqo los entiende como una cadena operacional conectada.
healthcare.reality_content_4: El problema no son los datos. El problema es que nadie ve cómo los datos se mueven a través del negocio.
healthcare.runtime_content_1: Demanda de pacientes. Carga clínica. Uso de camas. Capacidad del quirófano.
healthcare.runtime_content_2: Rendimiento del laboratorio. Disponibilidad de personal. Desempeño financiero. Exposición a la conformidad.
healthcare.runtime_content_3: Conectado a un runtime operativo único, el liderazgo puede actuar antes de que la presión cause fallos.
healthcare.ownership_content_1: La mayoría de los ejecutivos reciben reportes después de que ocurren los eventos. Avantiqo identifica la presión operativa antes de que se convierta en un problema.
healthcare.ownership_content_2: Ver la escasez de personal antes de que fallen los horarios. Ver limitaciones de capacidad antes de que aumenten los retrasos de los pacientes.
healthcare.ownership_content_3: Ver la exposición financiera antes de que los presupuestos se vean afectados. Ver el riesgo de cumplimiento antes de que las auditorías lo revelen.
healthcare.healthcare_connects: El sistema de salud está conectado en todas partes.

construction.construction_hero_title1: Controle cada obra antes de que los retrasos se conviertan en pérdidas.
construction.construction_hero_title2: Plataforma de construcción en tiempo real
construction.construction_hero_description: Presupuestos, compras, personal, aprobaciones, informes de obra, documentos y visibilidad financiera conectados en un único sistema de construcción.
construction.before_after_title: Reemplaza la gestión de construcción desconectada con control de proyectos en vivo.
construction.features_title: Obra, oficina y finanzas conectadas en tiempo real.
construction.feature_1_title: Control de proyectos en tiempo real
construction.feature_1_text: Siga el progreso, presupuestos, aprobaciones, retrasos, personal y rendimiento en tiempo real.
construction.feature_2_text: Los supervisores cargan fotos, informes diarios, problemas y actualizaciones directamente desde el sitio.
construction.feature_3_text: Controle solicitudes de compra, pedidos a proveedores, entregas de materiales y visibilidad del inventario.
construction.feature_4_text: Supervise asistencia, subcontratistas, costes laborales, aprobaciones de nómina y actividad del personal.
construction.feature_5_text: Gestione múltiples obras, presupuestos y equipos de proyecto desde una única plataforma.
construction.feature_6_text: Los propietarios y directivos visualizan en tiempo real el progreso, los costes, las aprobaciones y los riesgos desde cualquier lugar.
construction.reduce_project_delays_description: Identificar problemas del sitio, cuellos de botella de aprobación y retrasos antes de que afecten la entrega.
construction.control_budget_overruns_description: [ES] Track committed costs, supplier spend, labor cost and project financial exposure live.
construction.connect_site_office_description: [ES] Bring field updates, project management, approvals and finance into one connected workflow.
construction.improve_contractor_accountability: Mejorar la responsabilidad de los contratistas
construction.improve_contractor_accountability_descri: Supervise la actividad de contratistas, el progreso, la asistencia y la finalización de tareas con evidencia.
construction.faster_approvals_description: Gestione solicitudes de compra, cambios, facturas y aprobaciones mediante flujos estructurados.
construction.real_time_owner_reporting: Informes en tiempo real para propietarios
construction.real_time_owner_reporting_description: Sustituya informes tardíos por visibilidad en tiempo real del progreso, riesgos y presupuesto.
construction.why_1_text: See every project, milestone, budget, delay, approval and risk from one operational runtime.
construction.why_2_text: Track subcontractors, attendance, progress, photos and task completion with evidence.
construction.why_3_text: Connect procurement, labor, inventory and project spend to understand real profitability.
construction.why_4_text: Owners and executives can monitor every site without waiting for weekly reports.
construction.portal_client_text: Clients can follow progress, approvals, milestones, photos, invoices and project status in real time.
construction.portal_contractor_text: Subcontractors can submit updates, attendance, photos, documents and completion evidence directly from site.
construction.si_1_text: Identify schedule risks before they impact project delivery.
construction.si_2_text: Detect procurement, labor and change-order risks before they become financial problems.
construction.si_3_text: Generate owner-ready project summaries automatically from site activity.
construction.si_4_text: Recommend purchasing actions based on inventory, project schedules and supplier performance.
construction.marketing_text: Generate company profiles, capability statements, tender documents, project case studies, social media posts and marketing campaigns directly from completed projects.
construction.challenge_title: Construction Companies Are Losing Money Every Day
construction.challenge_text: Most construction companies do not lose money because they lack projects. They lose money because they lack visibility. Delays, procurement mistakes, subcontractor issues, budget overruns and communication failures often remain hidden until they have already damaged profitability. Avantiqo gives management real-time visibility across projects, people, suppliers, budgets and execution so problems can be solved before they become losses.
construction.profitability_title: Know Which Projects Actually Make Money
construction.profitability_text: Revenue is not profit. Most construction companies can tell you project revenue, but very few can accurately explain project profitability. Avantiqo connects quotations, budgets, procurement, inventory, labor, subcontractors, equipment costs and invoices into one financial model so management can see exactly where profit is generated and where margins are disappearing.
construction.flow_text: Construction companies often operate with disconnected systems. Sales uses one platform, project teams use another, procurement uses spreadsheets and accounting operates separately. Avantiqo connects the entire lifecycle from lead generation and quotations to project completion, billing, case studies and marketing, creating a single operational runtime for the entire company.
construction.workforce_text: Managing hundreds of workers, supervisors and subcontractors across multiple sites is one of the biggest challenges in construction. Avantiqo provides workforce visibility, attendance tracking, payroll management, productivity monitoring, contractor oversight and operational reporting from one connected platform.
construction.procurement_text: Materials, equipment and procurement represent some of the largest project costs. Avantiqo connects purchase requests, supplier management, inventory, warehouses, equipment tracking and project allocations into one procurement engine. Every material movement becomes visible and every purchase becomes traceable.
construction.difference_text: Most software solves one problem. Project management software manages tasks. ERP systems manage accounting. CRM systems manage customers. Avantiqo connects the entire construction business. Projects, procurement, workforce, finance, clients, marketing and synthetic intelligence operate from one environment instead of ten disconnected systems.
construction.future_text: The future construction company operates with live visibility, connected workflows and predictive intelligence. Instead of reacting to delays, budget overruns and operational surprises, management can make informed decisions before problems occur. Avantiqo transforms construction companies from reactive organizations into proactive businesses.
construction.cta_text: Connect projects, procurement, workforce, finance, reporting, client visibility, marketing and synthetic intelligence into one construction operating system.
construction.difference_1_text: Project management tools manage tasks. Construction companies need to manage entire businesses.
construction.difference_2_text: Traditional ERP systems were built around accounting. Avantiqo is built around operational reality.
construction.difference_3_text: Every project, supplier, worker, asset and transaction becomes part of one connected operational model.
construction.difference_4_text: Replace disconnected project software, CRM, ERP, reporting and marketing tools with one connected environment.

synthetic_intelligence.hero_subtitle: Harness the power of Synthetic Intelligence to unify data, predict trends, and make informed decisions faster across your enterprise.
synthetic_intelligence.vision_title: The Goal Is Not To Automate Work.
synthetic_intelligence.vision_text: The goal is to create organizations that understand themselves.
synthetic_intelligence.vision_footer: That is the future Avantiqo is building.
synthetic_intelligence.section_1_description:
Synthetic Intelligence (SI) is a next-generation intelligence system designed
to analyze, predict, and optimize operational and financial performance across a business
in real time. Unlike traditional AI, SI integrates multiple streams of business data—including
finance, operations, customer management, and human resources—into a single, intelligent layer
that provides actionable insights and predictive recommendations.
synthetic_intelligence.section_2_description:
SI allows businesses to anticipate bottlenecks, optimize workflows, and improve
decision-making by providing a comprehensive, real-time overview of all critical business
operations. By leveraging SI, executives can make informed decisions proactively, rather than
reacting to problems after they occur, improving efficiency, reducing costs, and increasing growth.
synthetic_intelligence.section_3_description:
- Real-time insights across departments and functions
- Predictive analytics for operational efficiency
- Centralized intelligence for faster decision-making
- Enhanced visibility for leadership to monitor KPIs
- Automated recommendations to optimize resource allocation
synthetic_intelligence.section_4_description:
Artificial Intelligence Creates Answers:
AI can generate text, images, reports, and recommendations. However, it does not understand
the organization itself. It can answer questions, but it cannot continuously understand
the relationships between operations, customers, staff, finance, compliance, and performance.

Synthetic Intelligence Creates Understanding:
SI is not designed to generate answers. It creates organizational awareness. Every customer
interaction, operational event, financial transaction, staff activity, project milestone, and
compliance requirement becomes part of a continuously evolving model of the organization.
This allows leadership to understand not only what happened, but why and what is likely to
happen next.

The Digital Twin Of The Organization:
SI produces a living operational model of the business—a digital twin. Instead of viewing
departments separately, the organization is understood as a connected system where decisions,
events, and outcomes influence each other. Leaders can identify risks, opportunities, and
bottlenecks before they appear in reports.

security.hero_subtitle: Avantiqo is designed for businesses that manage sensitive operational, financial, customer, staff and organizational data. Security must exist across every layer: access, approvals, visibility, audit trails, portals, integrations and data separation.
security.model_title: Protect The Business. Protect The Data. Protect The Decisions.
security.why_title: Security Creates Trust. Trust Creates Adoption.
security.data_title: A Platform That Understands Sensitive Business Data.
security.pillar_1_text: Avantiqo is built around organization-based access. Users only see the companies, departments, workspaces and records they are permitted to access. This prevents staff, managers, clients or external users from seeing information outside their responsibility.
security.pillar_2_text: Every user role can be restricted by function. Owners, managers, accounting teams, staff, customers and external collaborators can receive different levels of access. Sensitive actions such as approvals, payments, payroll, finance, customer records and reporting can be protected behind permission layers.
security.pillar_3_text: Avantiqo is designed for multi-company and multi-client use. Each organization operates inside its own controlled environment. This is especially important for accounting firms, hospitality groups, healthcare groups and enterprise companies managing multiple clients, branches or subsidiaries.
security.pillar_4_text: Important actions should not happen silently. Avantiqo supports approval flows for invoices, payroll, accounting actions, customer requests, operational changes and management decisions. This creates accountability and reduces the risk of unauthorized or accidental actions.
security.pillar_5_text: A secure system must show who did what, when it happened and why it matters. Avantiqo is designed to support audit trails across approvals, records, submissions, changes and operational events so leadership can investigate actions instead of guessing.
security.pillar_6_text: Customer portals and staff portals should never expose internal business controls. Avantiqo separates external customer visibility from internal operational access, allowing customers to see what is relevant to them while protecting internal data, financial logic and management decisions.

privacy.hero_subtitle: Trust cannot exist without privacy. Organizations cannot build intelligence, governance, compliance, operational visibility or enterprise-scale decision making without confidence that their information remains protected.
privacy.section_4_title: How Avantiqo Does NOT Use Data
privacy.section_1_text:
Privacy cannot be added after a system is built.

Privacy must be incorporated into architecture, governance, access controls, workflows, intelligence systems and operational processes from the beginning.

At Avantiqo, privacy is not treated as a legal checkbox. Privacy is built into the foundation of the platform itself.

Every workflow.
Every approval.
Every operational process.
Every customer interaction.
Every financial transaction.
Every intelligence layer.

Privacy exists as a fundamental design principle because trust is the foundation of every modern organization.
privacy.section_2_text:
Modern organizations generate information continuously.

Every customer interaction.
Every financial transaction.
Every approval.
Every operational event.
Every employee action.
Every project milestone.
Every compliance activity.
Every document.
Every decision.

Together these activities create the operational memory of the organization.

Protecting that information is not simply a regulatory requirement.

It is a business requirement.
privacy.section_3_text:
Your organization owns its data.

Always.

Avantiqo does not sell customer information.
Avantiqo does not sell employee information.
Avantiqo does not sell operational information.
Avantiqo does not sell financial information.
Avantiqo does not monetize organizational intelligence.

The platform exists to help organizations understand themselves, not to take ownership of the information they generate.
privacy.section_4_text:
Avantiqo does not sell customer data.

Avantiqo does not share information between organizations.

Avantiqo does not build advertising profiles.

Avantiqo does not monetize operational activity.

Avantiqo does not use customer information to train public AI systems.

The objective of the platform is to help organizations understand themselves.

Not to exploit the information they generate.
privacy.section_5_text:
Synthetic Intelligence introduces a fundamentally different approach to intelligence.

Traditional artificial intelligence often attempts to learn from large volumes of public information.

Synthetic Intelligence focuses on understanding organizational reality.

Its purpose is not to profile individuals.

Its purpose is not to create advertising models.

Its purpose is not to exploit user behavior.

Its purpose is organizational awareness.

Not personal surveillance.

governance.hero_subtitle: Governance is not bureaucracy. Governance creates accountability, visibility, consistency and decision control across the organization.
governance.section_1_text: Governance is not the same as management. Management focuses on executing work, while governance defines how decisions are made, who is responsible, what controls exist and how accountability is maintained. Strong governance creates consistency across the organization and ensures decisions align with strategic objectives.
governance.section_2_text: Organizations become increasingly complex as they grow. More people, more departments, more approvals and more operational processes create opportunities for inconsistency and risk. Governance provides the structure that allows organizations to scale while maintaining control, transparency and accountability.
governance.section_3_text: Governance is often viewed as an administrative burden, but in reality it can become a competitive advantage. Organizations with strong governance make decisions faster, reduce operational risk, improve accountability and build greater trust with customers, partners, regulators and investors.
governance.section_4_text: Every important decision should follow a clear governance framework. Decision governance defines who can make decisions, when approvals are required, what information is needed and how outcomes are documented. This reduces confusion and ensures consistency across the organization.
governance.section_5_text: Approval workflows transform governance into operational practice. Invoices, payroll actions, procurement requests, project changes and financial transactions can all follow defined approval paths. This creates visibility, accountability and control while reducing unauthorized actions.
governance.section_6_text: Governance only works when accountability is clear. Every action, approval, exception and decision should have an identifiable owner. Organizational accountability ensures responsibilities are visible and leadership can understand who is responsible for outcomes.
governance.section_7_text: Transparency is essential for effective governance. Auditability allows organizations to understand what happened, when it happened, who was involved and why decisions were made. Strong audit trails support investigations, compliance activities and continuous improvement.
governance.section_8_text: Governance should not be limited to finance or compliance teams. It must extend across operations, human resources, procurement, projects, customer management, technology and executive decision-making. Governance becomes most effective when it is embedded into every workflow.
governance.section_9_text: Synthetic Intelligence strengthens governance by identifying anomalies, monitoring organizational behavior, highlighting risks and recommending actions. Instead of replacing governance, Synthetic Intelligence enhances visibility and helps leaders make better-informed decisions.
governance.section_10_text: Authority should be assigned intentionally. Role-based authority ensures that employees, managers, executives and external stakeholders only have access to the decisions and actions appropriate to their responsibilities. This reduces risk while improving operational clarity.
governance.section_11_text: Risk management and governance are closely connected. Governance establishes controls that reduce financial, operational, legal and reputational risks. Organizations that manage risk proactively are more resilient and better positioned for long-term success.
governance.section_12_text: Compliance requirements become easier to manage when governance is built into daily operations. Governance creates consistent processes, approval structures and accountability mechanisms that support regulatory compliance without relying on manual oversight.
governance.section_13_text: Executive leadership is ultimately responsible for governance. Leaders define organizational standards, establish accountability structures and create the culture that supports ethical decision-making, transparency and long-term sustainability.
governance.section_14_text: The future of governance will combine human judgment, operational transparency and Synthetic Intelligence. Organizations will move beyond static policies toward dynamic governance systems that continuously monitor risk, accountability and performance in real time.

compliance.hero_subtitle: Avantiqo integrates compliance into operational workflows, ensuring accountability, visibility, and auditability across every department and process.
compliance.section_1_text: Compliance is not a one-time initiative. Regulations, operational requirements, customer expectations and internal controls evolve continuously. Organizations must embed compliance into everyday operations rather than treating it as a periodic project.
compliance.section_2_text: Compliance protects organizations from financial, operational, legal and reputational risk. It creates confidence among customers, regulators, investors and employees by demonstrating that the organization operates responsibly and consistently.
compliance.section_3_text: Operational compliance ensures that daily activities follow established procedures, policies and standards. From approvals and workflows to customer service and procurement, compliance helps maintain consistency and accountability.
compliance.section_4_text: Financial compliance supports accurate reporting, accountability and regulatory adherence. Strong financial controls reduce the risk of fraud, misstatements and operational errors while improving trust in financial information.
compliance.section_5_text: Data compliance focuses on protecting information, managing access and respecting privacy requirements. Organizations must understand what data exists, where it is stored, who can access it and how it is protected.
compliance.section_6_text: Governance provides the framework that makes compliance sustainable. Policies, approvals, accountability structures and decision controls create an environment where compliance becomes part of normal business operations.
compliance.section_7_text: Organizations should always be prepared for audits. Audit readiness requires accurate records, traceable decisions, documented approvals and reliable reporting processes that can be reviewed at any time.
compliance.section_8_text: Continuous monitoring allows organizations to identify compliance issues before they become serious problems. Real-time visibility improves responsiveness and reduces the likelihood of regulatory violations.
compliance.section_9_text: Synthetic Intelligence can strengthen compliance by detecting anomalies, monitoring operational behavior and identifying patterns that may indicate risk. This provides leadership with earlier visibility into potential compliance concerns.
compliance.section_10_text: Compliance depends on accountability. Every process, approval, exception and decision should have a responsible owner. Clear accountability improves control and reduces organizational risk.
compliance.section_11_text: Regulatory readiness means being prepared for changing requirements. Organizations that build strong compliance foundations can adapt more quickly to new laws, standards and reporting obligations.
compliance.section_12_text: As organizations grow, compliance becomes more complex. Scalable compliance systems help maintain consistency across multiple departments, locations, subsidiaries and operational environments.
compliance.section_13_text: The future of compliance will combine governance, operational transparency and intelligent monitoring. Organizations will move toward continuous compliance models that provide real-time assurance rather than periodic reviews.

gdpr.hero_subtitle: GDPR is built around transparency, accountability, privacy and control. Organizations must understand what information exists, how it is used and how it is protected.
gdpr.section_1_text: GDPR is not a checkbox exercise. It is a framework designed to ensure transparency, accountability and responsible handling of personal information throughout the organization.
gdpr.section_2_text: Organizations must understand what information they collect, why it is collected, how it is used and how long it is retained. Visibility is the foundation of data protection.
gdpr.section_3_text: Data may exist across applications, databases, documents, communication systems and operational platforms. Organizations must know where information is stored in order to protect it effectively.
gdpr.section_4_text: The organization remains the owner of its data. Service providers, software platforms and technology vendors process information on behalf of the organization but do not own the information itself.
gdpr.section_5_text: Access to information should be restricted according to responsibility and legitimate business need. Role-based access controls help protect sensitive information from unauthorized access.
gdpr.section_6_text: Individuals have the right to request access to personal information held about them. Organizations must be able to identify, retrieve and present that information in a transparent manner.
gdpr.section_7_text: Individuals have the right to correct inaccurate or incomplete personal information. Organizations should maintain processes that support accurate and up-to-date records.
gdpr.section_8_text: Individuals may request the deletion of personal information when retention is no longer required. Organizations must understand how data is stored and managed to support these requests.
gdpr.section_9_text: Data portability allows individuals to obtain and transfer their information between service providers. Organizations should maintain systems capable of providing information in accessible formats.
gdpr.section_10_text: Artificial Intelligence systems must respect privacy, transparency and data protection requirements. Organizations should understand how customer information is processed and ensure responsible use of AI technologies.
gdpr.section_11_text: Accountability requires evidence. Audit trails, activity logs, approvals and governance controls help organizations demonstrate compliance and investigate issues when necessary.
gdpr.section_12_text: Privacy, governance and compliance are interconnected. Effective GDPR programs rely on strong governance structures, operational controls and transparent decision-making.
gdpr.section_13_text: The future of data protection will focus on continuous visibility, stronger accountability and intelligent governance systems that help organizations protect information while maintaining operational efficiency.
